steps.title: Compare the temperatures
steps.content: The butterfly must reach at least $58.0$ degrees Fahrenheit, and its current body temperature is $46.4^\circ\text{F}$. The minimum increase is the difference between these two temperatures.

steps.title: Subtract current from needed
steps.content:
Compute the required increase.
$$58.0-46.4=11.6$$
The answer is D.
